steps.title: Identify the constraints from the problem description
steps.content: The phrase positive mass means $m > 0$. The phrase less than 510 grams means $m < 510$. Since the mass must satisfy both conditions simultaneously, we need both inequalities to be true at the same time.

steps.title: Combine the constraints into a single inequality
steps.content: When we need both $m > 0$ and $m < 510$ to be true together, we write the compound inequality as $0 < m < 510$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
